2604.14989.title: Dr.~RTL: Autonomous Agentic RTL Optimization through Tool-Grounded Self-Improvement
2604.14989.paper_summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have sparked growing interest in automatic RTL optimization for better performance, power, and area (PPA). However, existing methods are still far from realistic RTL optimization. Their evaluation settings are often unrealistic: they are tested on manually degraded, small-scale RTL designs and rely on weak open-source tools. Their optimization methods are also limited, relying on coarse design-level feedback and simple pre-defined rewriting rules. To address these limitations, we present Dr. RTL, an agentic framework for RTL timing optimization in a realistic evaluation environment, with continual self-improvement through reusable optimization skills. We establish a realistic evaluation setting with more challenging RTL designs and an industrial EDA workflow. Within this setting, Dr. RTL performs closed-loop optimization through a multi-agent framework for critical-path analysis, parallel RTL rewriting, and tool-based evaluation. We further introduce group-relative skill learning, which compares parallel RTL rewrites and distills the optimization experience into an interpretable skill library. Currently, this library contains 47 pattern--strategy entries for cross-design reuse to improve PPA and accelerate convergence, and it can continue evolving over time. Evaluated on 20 real-world RTL designs, Dr. RTL achieves average WNS/TNS improvements of 21\%/17\% with a 6\% area reduction over the industry-leading commercial synthesis tool.
2604.14989.paper_summary_zh: 最近大型語言模型（LLMs）的進展引發了對自動 RTL 優化的日益關注，以改善性能、功耗和面積（PPA）。然而，現有的方法仍然遠未實現現實的 RTL 優化。它們的評估設置往往不切實際：它們在手動降級的小型 RTL 設計上進行測試，並依賴於較弱的開源工具。它們的優化方法也有限，依賴於粗略的設計層級反饋和簡單的預定義重寫規則。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了 Dr. RTL，一個針對 RTL 時序優化的代理框架，在現實的評估環境中進行持續的自我改進，並通過可重用的優化技能實現。 我們建立了一個現實的評估設置，包含更具挑戰性的 RTL 設計和工業 EDA 工作流程。在這個設置中，Dr. RTL 通過多代理框架進行閉環優化，進行關鍵路徑分析、平行 RTL 重寫和基於工具的評估。我們進一步引入了群體相對技能學習，該方法比較平行 RTL 重寫並將優化經驗提煉成可解釋的技能庫。目前，該技能庫包含 47 個模式--策略條目，以便於跨設計重用，改善 PPA 並加速收斂，並且可以隨著時間的推移持續演變。在 20 個真實世界的 RTL 設計上進行評估時，Dr. RTL 實現了平均 WNS/TNS 改進 21\%/17\%，並在行業領先的商業綜合工具上實現了 6\% 的面積減少。
2604.14989.author: Wenji Fang et.al.
2604.14989.authors: Wenji Fang, Yao Lu, Shang Liu, Jing Wang, Ziyan Guo, Junxian He, Fengbin Tu, Zhiyao Xie
